creator: jensh604@gmail.com
text:
as root on freebsd-10.1 (in VirtualBox eg not usb 2.0)
mtpfs /mnt
Listing raw device(s)
Device 0 (VID=0fce and PID=0170) is a SONY ST21i Xperia Tipo MTP.
